description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a gable roof covered in dark shingles and white exterior walls. The front features a double garage with a driveway, a set of steps leading to a raised entry porch, and a geometric patterned walkway. The property is enclosed by a low white wall, with a small green lawn area on one side and a paved area on the other. Windows are symmetrically placed on the visible facades, and the rear of the house is simple with minimal ornamentation. The overall design is clean and modern, with practical outdoor spaces and clear separation between driveway and pedestrian access.
description: A modern, single-story house with a gable roof, white walls, a double garage, and a geometric entryway, surrounded by a low wall and lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entry steps, geometric walkway, and lawn area enclosed by a white wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, plain white wall, two windows, and the continuation of the lawn and walkway.
description_view_2: Rear view with two windows and a simple, unadorned facade, showing the back lawn and wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the geometric walkway, side windows, and the transition between paved and green areas.
attribute_entryway_design: Raised entry porch with steps, geometric patterned walkway, and a double garage door adjacent to the main entrance.
